CustomField.formula: IF(IP_MissingPayrollDetail__c = "Incomplete active pay profiles, ", (IMAGE("/resource/Images/IncompleteActivePayProfilesAmber.png", "Incomplete active Pay Profiles")), IF( NOT( ISBLANK( IP_MissingPayrollDetail__c ) ) , (IMAGE("/resource/Images/PayrollDetailNotCompleteRed.png", "Payroll detail not complete")), (IMAGE("/resource/Images/PayrollDetailCompleteGreen.png", "Payroll detail complete"))))
CustomField.label: Payroll Graphic
